title: LPC-Associate
bio: Sara Narsi is a LPC-Associate or LMSW practicing under the supervision of Dr. Manahil Riaz (LPC-Supervisor), serving clients from our Sugar Land office. Sara's primary areas of focus include Women's Issues, Spirituality, and Life Transitions. Sara draws on evidence-based approaches such as Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), Culturally Sensitive approaches, and Eclectic Therapy, and offers couples therapy and group therapy alongside individual sessions. Sara works with adults (ages 20–64).
